name: pi-web-tools
description: First-party Pi web tools: provider-toggled web search, Exa deep research, content retrieval, and OpenAI native web_search integration.

settings.label: Enable web tools
settings.description: Register web_search, web_fetch, web_research, answer/similar/code search, commands, and native web-search rewrites.

settings.label: Auto-enable web tools
settings.description: Add supported web tools to the active tool set while preserving Pi native tools.

settings.label: Default provider
settings.description: Provider used by web_search unless the tool call overrides it.

settings.label: OpenAI native web_search
settings.description: Rewrite the function web_search tool to native OpenAI/Codex Responses web_search when supported.

settings.label: OpenAI external web access
settings.description: Set external_web_access on native OpenAI web_search tools.

settings.label: Exa deep research
settings.description: Register and enable web_research for Exa Deep Search.

settings.label: Exa advanced tools
settings.description: Enable advanced Exa fetch, answer, find-similar, and code search tools.

settings.label: Compatibility aliases
settings.description: Register legacy aliases such as fetch_content and web_search_exa. Off by default to avoid duplicate tool names.

settings.label: Curator UI
settings.description: Allow curator workflow when interactive. Full browser review UI is staged for a follow-up phase.

settings.label: Curator timeout
settings.description: Timeout cap for curator workflows, capped at 600 seconds.

settings.label: Summary model
settings.description: Model preference for curator summaries; use current to keep the active model.

settings.label: Include content by default
settings.description: Fetch page content after search results by default.

settings.label: Browser cookie access
settings.description: Opt-in browser cookie extraction for Gemini Web fallback. Requires reload because it may trigger credential prompts.

settings.label: GitHub clone extraction
settings.description: Enable GitHub clone extraction for repository URLs. Full clone cache is staged for follow-up parity.

settings.label: GitHub clone max size
settings.description: Large repository fallback threshold in MB.

settings.label: Video extraction
settings.description: Enable YouTube/local video understanding. Full Gemini/yt-dlp support is staged for follow-up parity.
